headline: Is NIKE, Inc. (NKE) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is NKE a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on NIKE, Inc. on Alpha Talon Investment Research’s Substack by AT Investment Research. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on NKE. NIKE, Inc.’s share was trading at $46.48 as of April 20th. NKE’s trailing and forward P/E were 30.58 and 23.98 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: Bloody Thursday: Up to 18,000 people lose jobs or face buyouts at Meta, Nike and Microsoft
summary: Turnaround strategies and AI deployment are to blame.

headline: Q2 catalyst: Will World Cup innovation deliver the rebound Nike and Adidas need?
summary: Investing.com -- As the 2026 World Cup approaches, retail giants Nike (NYSE:NKE) and Adidas (OTC:ADDYY) are ramping up their offensive, aiming to capitalize on a tournament expected to inject significant energy into the global sportswear category.
